aspect_ratio_for_supported_providers_and: Aspect ratio for supported providers and models
camera_controls_for_luma_pan_zoom_tilt_t: Camera controls for Luma (pan, zoom, tilt, truck, tracking)
consistency_mode_for_runway_character_ob: Consistency mode for Runway (character, object, style, location)
describe_the_video_you_want_to_generate: Describe the video you want to generate...
enable_prompt_optimization_for_minimax_d: Enable prompt optimization for MiniMax (default: true)
generate_high_quality_videos_from_text_p: Generate high-quality videos from text prompts using leading AI providers. Supports multiple models, aspect ratios, resolutions, and provider-specific features like world consistency, camera controls, and audio generation.
generate_native_audio_when_supported_by_: Generate native audio when supported by the selected model
generate_videos_from_text_using_ai: Generate videos from text using AI
video_generation_provider_runway_veo_lum: Video generation provider (runway, veo, luma, minimax, falai)
video_resolution_for_supported_providers: Video resolution for supported providers and models
